summary: Backend 19/19 pytest passed (auth, role guards, curriculum CRUD, multilingual lesson gen EN+MS, quiz gen/submit/wrong-count/other-user 404, tutor chat emotion neg+pos, progress, teacher students, admin analytics). Frontend: student/teacher/admin login each route correctly; student topic click generated full lesson (Introduction to Fractions with sections & key points); tutor chat panel present; language switcher MS works; teacher dashboard shows 3 seeded curriculum + Add form + students table; admin dashboard shows 4 users, 3 curriculum, AI usage bars, language distribution, full users list.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') - consider lifespan handlers
No data-testid attributes on login/topic/lesson/logout/language buttons — makes automation fragile (tests worked via text filters)
CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True is spec-invalid (browsers reject credentialed * )
make_token uses jwt.encode but python-jwt returns str already — fine; no refresh token endpoint
seed_data_creation: Used seeded users+curriculum; created one TEST_ user via register and one TEST_Curr (then deleted) during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 19 pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py pass in ~11s. Frontend requires clicking the LAST button with text 'LOG IN' (the first is the LOG IN/REGISTER tab). Topics on /student are buttons with topic titles (e.g. 'Fractions'). Language switcher buttons: EN/MS/ZH. Consider adding data-testid attrs. Groq calls 3–10s; use 30–60s timeouts.
